summary: The diff shows only two files modified: backend/main.mo (which appears to be a refactor/rewrite of the backend logic but does not represent a deployment action) and project_state.json (which only updates the project state to mark the publish request as 'pending'). No actual deployment configuration, canister IDs, dfx.json updates, CI/CD pipeline changes, or public URL evidence is present. The requirement to publish and deploy the application so it is publicly accessible has not been implemented.

missing_requirements.requirement: Publish and deploy the AI Healthcare Monitoring application so it is publicly accessible, with a public URL, all features functional, and the backend canister live.
missing_requirements.reason: The diff contains no deployment artifacts, no canister deployment configuration, no public URL, no CI/CD pipeline, and the project_state.json marks the feature as 'pending' rather than completed. The backend/main.mo change is a code modification, not a deployment action.

hallucinated_features.description: Backend Motoko actor rewrite using mo:core library (Map.empty, Runtime.trap, etc.) replacing presumably existing backend logic.
hallucinated_features.reason: The diff modifies backend/main.mo with what appears to be a rewritten or refactored actor using a different library (mo:core instead of mo:base). This change was not requested — the build request explicitly states not to alter existing functionality or data models, and the non-goals include not modifying backend logic or health record schema.
